markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Demo and discussion around AI-powered content creation and outreach services from GrowthX for ProjectMark, a construction CRM startup.](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses AI workflows to generate high-quality content at scale, adapting to the client's brand voice and industry](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [They plant many content "seeds" and double down on what performs well based on data signals](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GrowthX also offers AI-powered outbound email campaigns for booking sales meetings](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [ProjectMark is interested in testing GrowthX's content and outreach services as a more lightweight, turnkey solution](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Content Creation Process

  - [Combines programmatic content generation with human review/editing by trained specialists](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Starts with strategy, keyword research, competitor analysis to identify topics](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows to generate titles, outlines, drafts based on top-ranking content](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Adapts content to client's brand voice through examples and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Publishes quickly, monitors performance signals, and iterates/refreshes content](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

### Content Performance and Metrics

  - [Primary KPI is increase in organic traffic and keyword rankings over time](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Showed examples of traffic growth curves for other clients](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [For ProjectMark, would monitor metrics like sessions, rankings using tools like SemRush](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
  - [Aim to build topical authority beyond just "construction CRM" queries](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)

### AI-Powered Outbound Campaigns

  - [GrowthX runs multi-channel outbound campaigns using AI for copy personalization](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=2668.0)
  - [Tests many variants for best subject lines, messaging by audience](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=2736.0)
  - [Handles email warmup, deliverability, meeting booking workflows](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [Shared example of insurance campaign driving hundreds of meetings per month](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=2782.0)

### Proposed Engagement for ProjectMark

  - [Lighter, more turnkey content engagement to start (e.g. 30-40k words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [GrowthX handles end-to-end content production with some async feedback](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [Potential to add on outbound meeting campaigns managed by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
  - [3 month initial commitment to test and iterate the process](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide more details on pricing and engagement scope](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [ProjectMark to evaluate fit for their content and outbound needs](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=2900.0)
  - [Discuss further integration points (e.g. CRM, website, existing SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=2929.0)
  - [Set expectations around feedback loops and performance reviews](https://fathom.video/share/YhVZWdGRLkMP5K3FEBW5MWuEMsq_r4vz?tab=summary&timestamp=3160.0)
